content.problemStatement:
For an array BBB, while it has more than one element, you can apply an operation on it - you choose any two elements x,yx,yx,y  (they may be the same value, but they should have different indices), delete them, and add an element g(x,y)g(x, y)g(x,y) instead.

Here g(x,y)g(x, y)g(x,y) denotes the highest set bit in x‚äēyx \oplus yx‚äēy, or 000 if they are equal. In other words, g(x,y)=max‚Ā°2kg(x, y) = \max 2^kg(x,y)=max2k, such that 2k‚Č§(x‚äēy)2^k \leq (x \oplus y)2k‚Č§(x‚äēy) for x‚Č†yx \neq yxÓÄ†=y, and g(x,y)=0g(x,y)=0g(x,y)=0 if x=yx = yx=y. For example, g(1,1)=0,g(1,2)=2,g(2,4)=4,g(13,17)=16g(1,1) = 0, g(1,2) = 2, g(2,4)=4, g(13,17)=16g(1,1)=0,g(1,2)=2,g(2,4)=4,g(13,17)=16.

Given an array BBB, we try to apply the operations repeatedly in such a way that when we are left with only one element at the end, that element is as small as possible. Let's denote this smallest possible value of the element at the end as f(B)f(B)f(B).

You are given an array AAA with NNN elements, you need to find the sum of f(Al‚Ä¶r)f(A_{l \ldots r})f(Al‚Ä¶r‚Äč) among all subsegments 1‚Č§l‚Č§r‚Č§N1 \leq l \leq r \leq N1‚Č§l‚Č§r‚Č§N.

The answer may be large, so you need to find it modulo 998‚ÄČ244‚ÄČ353998\,244\,353998244353.

###Input:


The first line contains one integer NNN.
The second line contains NNN integers A1,A2,‚Ä¶,ANA_1, A_2, \ldots, A_NA1‚Äč,A2‚Äč,‚Ä¶,AN‚Äč.
###Output:
In a single line, print the sum, modulo 998‚ÄČ244‚ÄČ353998\,244\,353998244353.

###Constraints


1‚Č§N‚Č§300‚ÄČ0001 \leq N \leq 300\,0001‚Č§N‚Č§300000
0‚Č§Ai<2300 \leq A_i < 2^{30}0‚Č§Ai‚Äč<230
###Subtasks


10 points : 1‚Č§N‚Č§101 \leq N \leq 101‚Č§N‚Č§10
10 points : 1‚Č§N‚Č§5001 \leq N \leq 5001‚Č§N‚Č§500
10 points : 1‚Č§N‚Č§50001 \leq N \leq 50001‚Č§N‚Č§5000
